prompt: Create a realistic vertical fashion portrait photograph of a young East Asian woman sitting sideways on a pale stone waterfront ledge beside a calm bay, shown from mid-thigh to head in a 9:16 crop. She wears a fitted pale sage-green ribbed knit maxi dress with thin straps and a low scoop neckline, simple gold bracelets on both wrists, and a woven straw shoulder bag partly visible behind her. Her very long dark wavy hair is blown gently by the wind over her back and shoulder. Pose her seated with knees angled forward, one hand resting on the ledge at the lower left and the other relaxed near her lap, torso turned slightly toward camera but face in clean side profile looking left across the water. Use soft natural daylight, muted blue-gray atmospheric tones, shallow-to-medium depth of field, and a serene editorial mood. Background: expansive calm water filling most of the frame, hazy distant skyline and low mountains on the horizon, pale blue sky, no readable text, no logos, no extra people. Emphasize realistic skin texture, elegant posture, wind movement in the hair, and a high-end lifestyle photography look. Use pale sage green as the main clothing color and misty coastal city bay for the environment.
